notes: Dubrovnik region sample locations. Merge these into samples.json in the canonical pseudogenome_pool_v1. Organisms org_031-org_038 must be added first.

Vjetrenica_Cave.description: Subterranean karst cave community dominated by sulfur-oxidizing chemolithotrophs and oligotrophic specialists. Vjetrenica is one of the longest caves in the Dinaric karst, connected to the Popovo Polje floodplain near Dubrovnik.

workshop.notes: High-impact sample. Students rarely expect chemolithotrophs — finding sulfur_oxidation_like here should prompt a 'why?' discussion about energy sources in dark environments.

Lokrum_Coast.description: Rocky Mediterranean coastline of Lokrum Island, a nature reserve just off the Dubrovnik old town walls. Marine biofilm formers, bioluminescent Vibrio, and photoautotrophs dominate.

workshop.notes: Great sample for bioluminescence discussion. Lokrum is a protected reserve — no human pollution signal, making it a useful contrast to Old_Town_Harbor.

Kolocep_Seagrass.description: Posidonia oceanica seagrass meadow sediment from around Kolocep (Calamota), the nearest of the Elaphiti Islands. Seagrass-associated decomposers and rhizosphere bacteria dominate.

workshop.notes: Seagrass meadows are biodiversity hotspots and carbon sinks. polysaccharide_utilization_like and glycoside_hydrolase_like signal active decomposition of seagrass detritus.

Adriatic_Open.description: Open oligotrophic Adriatic seawater sampled roughly 5 km offshore from Dubrovnik. Dominated by photoautotrophs and marine heterotrophs; low biomass, high diversity.

workshop.notes: Low-biomass open ocean environment. Contrast with Lokrum_Coast and Kolocep_Seagrass — fewer dominant organisms, so Ct values will be higher (weaker signal). Good for teaching signal interpretation.

Old_Town_Harbor.description: Dubrovnik's historic Stara Luka harbor, influenced by boat traffic, tourists, and centuries of urban activity. Hydrocarbon degraders and biofilm specialists coexist with coastal marine taxa.

workshop.notes: High-impact human-activity signal. Finding alkane_monooxygenase_like and aromatic_ring_cleavage_like here vs. their absence on Lokrum makes for a powerful lesson in how pollution shapes microbial communities.
